mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.user_id, t.category_id, t.amount, t.type, t.memo, t.`date`, c.name AS category_name, c.icon AS category_icon FROM `transaction` t LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = t.category_id WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `transaction` (user_id, category_id, amount, type, memo, `date`) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{amount}, #{type}, #{memo}, #{date})
